name: skill-watcher
description: Observe Codex skill usage logs and support evidence-backed skill maintenance and compression.

interface.shortDescription: Maintain and compress skills from evidence
interface.longDescription: Skill Watcher collects redacted skill usage events, summarizes repeated outcomes, proposes bounded SKILL.md maintenance updates, and provides a skill-compressor workflow for reducing instruction footprint without semantic drift.
defaultPrompt: Analyze skill evidence for a maintenance proposal, or use skill-compressor for semantic-preserving instruction compression
